summary: A Fox Business 'Mornings with Maria' segment, complete with live stock-market tickers, previewing Secretary Noem's visit to El Salvador's prison holding deportees, anchored by Maria Bartiromo and reporter Cheryl Casone with the chyron 'NOEM TO VISIT EL SALVADOR PRISON HOLDING DEPORTEES.' It ends with split-screen B-roll of Noem deplaning. This is a straight cable-news/business-news report, not a music-driven or stylized production, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: NOEM TO VISIT EL SALVADOR PRISON HOLDING DEPORTEES
